goal: Run a deterministic benchmark workflow for Vitest and validate a repository smoke review without borrowing unrelated memory from HTTP, CLI, or validation cases.
test_command: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const pkg=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('package.json','utf8')); if(!pkg.name || !pkg.name.toLowerCase().includes('vitest')) process.exit(1); console.log(pkg.name)"
coder_summary: Write a deterministic benchmark marker file before repository review.
